recommendations.title: Failed Scheduler Jobs
recommendations.description: Failed jobs may indicate system issues or broken business processes.
recommendations.action: Review job logs, fix underlying issues, and re-enable failed jobs.
recommendations.reference: Oracle MOS Doc ID 1342596.1 - Troubleshooting Scheduler Jobs

failedJobs.failureMessage: The job failed.  The Job was invoked by Schedule 12 (Log shipping alert job schedule.).  The last step to run was step 1 (Log shipping alert job step.).
Executed as user: ACCESSBANK\svcsqladmin-gh. The step failed.
The job failed.  The Job was invoked by Schedule 21 (DefaultRestoreJobSchedule).  The last step to run was step 1 (Log shipping restore log job step.).
